1:
Dural Tharal, renowned reporter for the <Emphasis>Mythril Eye</Emphasis>, has solicited your help in what promises to be a splendid story. The Immortal Flames will soon be hosting “The Calamity Retold,” military exercises which draw from the lessons of the imperial invasion that took place years past. The Lalafell plans to interview people about their experiences of that time, and bids you accompany him that you might offer your unique perspective on the matter. The first stop is the Hall of Flames, where you will meet with an officer of the order.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

69:
“Calmly confident, the adventurer assured me of the sultanate's sustained security. For while our defenses demand due diligence, an excess of apprehension avails us naught.”
...Yes, something in that spirit shall serve.

“Calmly confident, the adventurer assured me of the sultanate's sustained security. For while our defenses demand due diligence, an excess of apprehension avails us naught.”
...Yes, something in that spirit shall serve.

70:
“Pointedly prudent, the adventurer advised against presuming that our preservation is promised. If the sultanate is to survive a savage strike, each and every one of her citizens must be invariably vigilant.”
...Yes, something in that spirit shall serve.

100:
“The adventurer articulated <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> approval of those daring deeds. In <If(PlayerParameter(4))>her<Else/>his</If> eyes, I glanced a glimpse of conviction─the conviction to carry on as stewards of the sultanate.”
...Aye, an ending to that effect.

101:

...Aye, an ending to that effect.

Upon your breast a crimson crest,♪
Shine Light down from on high.♪

By your deeds doth crimson bleed,♪
And Darkness quench the fire.♪
